article_meta.title: Administration Trump says there will ‘likely be more’ American deaths in Iran before conflict ends by Max Rego - 03\/01\

reasoning: The model repeatedly flags quoted statements as author bias and uses non-allowed/incorrect bias labels, while missing biased phrasing in the author’s own prose.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Both flagged items are quotes attributed to Trump; quoting cannot be treated as author bias.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: All flagged instances are not genuine author-level bias; they rely on quoted language and an overreach about sourcing.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed author-prose bias such as 'celebrated Khamenei’s death,' the subjective 'a slew of political and military officials,' and loaded phrasing like 'repeatedly crushing dissent.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed categories ('Loaded Language', 'Imbalance in Sourcing') and misapplied types to quoted content rather than author prose.
